member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation
member.summary: Represents the available filter operations.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.Equals
member.summary: Represents the "eq" filter operation, which checks for equality.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.NotEquals
member.summary: Represents the "ne" filter operation, which checks for inequality.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.Contains
member.summary: Represents the "cnt" filter operation, which checks if a value contains a specified substring.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.NotContains
member.summary: Represents the "!cnt" filter operation, which checks if a value does not contain a specified substring.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.Exists
member.summary: Represents the "ex" filter operation, which checks if a value exists.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.In
member.summary: Represents the "in" filter operation, which checks if a value is in a specified list.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.NotIn
member.summary: Represents the "!in" filter operation, which checks if a value is not in a specified list.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.GreaterThan
member.summary: Represents the "gt" filter operation, which checks if a value is greater than a specified value.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.GreaterThanOrEquals
member.summary: Represents the "gte" filter operation, which checks if a value is greater than or equal to a specified value.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.LowerThan
member.summary: Represents the "lt" filter operation, which checks if a value is lower than a specified value.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.LowerThanOrEquals
member.summary: Represents the "lte" filter operation, which checks if a value is lower than or equal to a specified value.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.Between
member.summary: Represents the "btw" filter operation, which checks if a value is between two specified values.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.Size
member.summary: Represents the "size" filter operation, which checks if the size of a value meets a specified condition.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.Has
member.summary: Represents the "has" filter operation, which checks if a value has a specified property.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation.NotHas
member.summary: Represents the "!has" filter operation, which checks if a value does not have a specified property.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Filter
member.summary: Represents a filter used for querying data.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Filter.#ctor(ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOperation,System.String,System.Object,System.Object[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Filter.Operation
member.summary: Gets or sets the filter operation.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Filter.Field
member.summary: Gets or sets the field to filter on.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Filter.Values
member.summary: Gets or sets the values to filter by.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOption
member.summary: Represents a filter option for querying data.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOption.Paging
member.summary: Gets or sets the paging options.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOption.Sorting
member.summary: Gets or sets the sorting options.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOption.Filters
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of filters.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.FilterOption.ToString
member.summary: Converts the filter option to a string representation.
member.returns: A string representation of the filter option.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Paging
member.summary: Represents the paging information for a collection of items.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Paging.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified number and size.
member.param: The number of items per page.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Paging.Number
member.summary: Gets or sets the page number.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Paging.Size
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of items per page.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.SortDirection
member.summary: Represents the sort direction.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.SortDirection.Ascending
member.summary: Represents the ascending sort direction.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.SortDirection.Descending
member.summary: Represents the descending sort direction.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Sorting
member.summary: Represents the sorting criteria.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Sorting.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.SortDirection)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified fields and direction.
member.param: The list of fields to sort by.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Sorting.Fields
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of fields to sort by.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Filtering.Sorting.Direction
member.summary: Gets or sets the sort direction.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService
member.summary: Interface to interact with common Report Portal services. Provides possibility to manage almost of service's endpoints.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.Launch
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing launches.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.AsyncLaunch
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing asynchronous launches.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.TestItem
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing test items.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.AsyncTestItem
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing asynchronous test items.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.LogItem
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing log items.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.AsyncLogItem
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing asynchronous log items.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.User
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing users.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.UserFilter
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing user filters.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.IClientService.Project
member.summary: Gets the resource for managing projects.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerItemsMode
member.summary: Represents the mode of analyzer items.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerItemsMode.ToInvestigate
member.summary: Represents the "To Investigate" mode of analyzer items.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerItemsMode.AutoAnalyzed
member.summary: Represents the "Auto Analyzed" mode of analyzer items.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerItemsMode.ManuallyAnalyzed
member.summary: Represents the "Manually Analyzed" mode of analyzer items.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerMode
member.summary: Represents the mode of the analyzer.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerMode.All
member.summary: Analyzes all launches.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerMode.CurrentLaunch
member.summary: Analyzes the current launch.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.AnalyzerMode.LaunchName
member.summary: Analyzes launches by launch name.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ItemAttribute
member.summary: Represents an attribute of an item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ItemAttribute.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the key of the attribute.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ItemAttribute.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the attribute.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ItemAttribute.IsSystem
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the attribute is a system attribute.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LaunchMode
member.summary: Describes modes for launches.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LaunchMode.Default
member.summary: The default launch mode.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LaunchMode.Debug
member.summary: The debug launch mode.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LogLevel
member.summary: Describes levels for log items.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LogLevel.Trace
member.summary: Represents the TRACE log level.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LogLevel.Debug
member.summary: Represents the DEBUG log level.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LogLevel.Info
member.summary: Represents the INFO log level.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LogLevel.Warning
member.summary: Represents the WARNING log level.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LogLevel.Error
member.summary: Represents the ERROR log level.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.LogLevel.Fatal
member.summary: Represents the FATAL log level.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ProjectRole
member.summary: Represents the roles that a user can have in a project.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ProjectRole.ProjectManager
member.summary: The user has the role of a project manager.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ProjectRole.Member
member.summary: The user has the role of a member.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ProjectRole.Operator
member.summary: The user has the role of an operator.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.ProjectRole.Customer
member.summary: The user has the role of a customer.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status
member.summary: Describes statuses of tests items.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.InProgress
member.summary: Test item is in progress.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Passed
member.summary: Test item has passed.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Failed
member.summary: Test item has failed.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Skipped
member.summary: Test item has been skipped.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Interrupted
member.summary: Test item has been interrupted.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Cancelled
member.summary: Test item has been cancelled.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Stopped
member.summary: Test item has been stopped.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Info
member.summary: Test item provides information.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.Status.Warn
member.summary: Test item has a warning.

member.summary: Describes types of test items.

member.summary: Represents a test suite.

member.summary: Represents a before class setup.

member.summary: Represents an after class cleanup.

member.summary: Represents an after method cleanup.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.TestItemType.BeforeMethod
member.summary: Represents a before method setup.

member.summary: Represents the type of filter for a user.

member.summary: Represents a filter for launches.

member.summary: Represents a product bug issue type.

member.summary: Represents an automation bug issue type.

member.summary: Represents a system issue type.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.WellKnownIssueType.ToInvestigate
member.summary: Represents an issue type that needs to be investigated.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Models.WellKnownIssueType.NotDefect
member.summary: Represents an issue type that is not a defect.

member.summary: Defines a request to analyze a launch.

member.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the launch to be analyzed.

member.summary: Gets or sets the mode of the analyzer.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the analyzer type.

member.summary: Gets or sets the mode of the analyzer items.

member.summary: Defines a request for assigning issues to test items.

member.summary: Gets or sets the list of test items and their issues.

member.summary: Gets or sets the issue of the test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.TestItemIssueUpdate.TestItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the test item to assign the issue.

member.summary: Defines a request for logging messages into Report Portal.

member.summary: ID of test item to add new logs.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateLogItemRequest.LaunchUuid
member.summary: Log item belongs to launch instead of test item if test item id is null.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateLogItemRequest.Time
member.summary: Date time of log item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateLogItemRequest.Level
member.summary: A level of log item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateLogItemRequest.Text
member.summary: Message of log item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateLogItemRequest.Attach
member.summary: Specify an attachment of log item.

member.summary: Represents an attachment for a log item.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LogItemAttach class with the specified MIME type and data.
member.param: The MIME type of the attachment.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.LogItemAttach.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the attachment.

member.summary: Defines a request for creating user filters.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the user filter.

member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the user filter.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateUserFilterRequest.Conditions
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of conditions to filter data.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateUserFilterRequest.Orders
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of parameters of selection.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateUserFilterRequest.IsShared
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the filter is shared.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateUserFilterRequest.Owner
member.summary: Gets or sets the owner of the filter.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.CreateUserFilterRequest.UserFilterType
member.summary: Gets or sets the user filter type enum.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishLaunchRequest
member.summary: Defines a request to finish execution of specified launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishLaunchRequest.EndTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the launch execution is finished.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest
member.summary: Defines a request to finish specified test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets a long description of the test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.EndTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the test item is finished.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the result of the test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.Issue
member.summary: Gets or sets the issue of the test item if the execution was proceeded with an error.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.Attributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the attributes when finishing the test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.IsRetry
member.summary: Gets or sets the retry status indicator.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.RetryOf
member.summary: Gets or sets the Test Item to be marked as a retry.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishTestItemRequest.LaunchUuid
member.summary: Gets or sets the UUID of the parent launch.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest
member.summary: Defines a content of request for service to create new launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the short name of the launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the launch is executed under debugging.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest.StartTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the launch is executed.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest.EndTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the launch is finished.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest.Launches
member.summary: Gets or sets the tags for the merged launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest.MergeType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of launches merge.

member.summary: Defines a content of request for service to create new launch.

member.summary: Gets or sets the short name of the launch.

member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the launch.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether the launch is executed under debugging.

member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the launch is executed.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartLaunchRequest.IsRerun
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to start a new launch or use an existing one.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartLaunchRequest.RerunOfLaunchUuid
member.summary: Gets or sets the UUID of the existing launch to use.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartLaunchRequest.Attributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the launch attributes.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartLaunchRequest.Uuid
member.summary: Gets or sets the specific launch UUID.

member.summary: Defines a content of request for service to create new test item in progress state.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.LaunchUuid
member.summary: ID of parent launch to create new test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.Name
member.summary: A short name of test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.Description
member.summary: A long description of test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.StartTime
member.summary: Date time when new test item is created.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.Type
member.summary: A type of test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.IsRetry
member.summary: Retry status indicator.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.RetryOf
member.summary: Test Item to be marked as retry.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.Parameters
member.summary: A list of parameters.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.UniqueId
member.summary: A test item unique id.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.TestCaseId
member.summary: Test Case ID.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.CodeReference
member.summary: Code reference for test. Example: namespace + classname + methodname

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.HasStats
member.summary: Define if test item has stats. If false - considered as nested step.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest.Attributes
member.summary: Test item attributes.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateLaunchRequest
member.summary: Defines a request to finish specified launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateLaunchRequest.Attributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of attributes to update for the launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateLaunchRequest.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateLaunchRequest.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the mode in which the launch is executed.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateTestItemRequest
member.summary: Defines a request to finish specified test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateTestItemRequest.Attributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the attributes for the test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateTestItemRequest.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the test item.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateTestItemRequest.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the new status for the test item.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.UpdateUserFilterRequest

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Resources.IAsyncLaunchResource
member.summary: Asynchronously interacts with launches.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Resources.IAsyncLaunchResource.FinishAsync(System.String,ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.FinishLaunchRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously finishes a specified launch.
member.param: The UUID of the specified launch.
Information about the representation of the launch to finish.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Resources.IAsyncLaunchResource.MergeAsync(ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.MergeLaunchesRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously merges several launches.
member.returns: Returns the model of the merged launches.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Resources.IAsyncLaunchResource.StartAsync(ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartLaunchRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously starts a new launch.

member.summary: Asynchronously interacts with log items.

member.summary: Asynchronously creates a new log item.
member.param: Information about representation of log item.
member.returns: Representation of just created log item.

member.summary: Asynchronously creates new log items.
member.param: Information about representation of log items.
member.returns: Representation of just created log items.

member.param: The ID of the specified test item.

member.summary: Asynchronously creates a new test item.
member.param: Information about the representation of the test item.
member.returns: The representation of the created test item.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Resources.IAsyncTestItemResource.StartAsync(System.String,ReportPortal.Client.Abstractions.Requests.StartTestItemRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a new test item.
member.param: The UUID of the parent item.
Information about the representation of the test item.
member.returns: The representation of the created test item.
